title: oenanthe silaifolia subsp. media
intro: Oenanthe silaifolia subsp. media, also known as Water Celery or Water Knotweed, is a plant species that belongs to the family Apiaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Oenanthe silaifolia subsp. media include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and supporting liver health. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture for its medicinal properties, and it is also used in traditional Asian cuisine as a flavoring agent.
